description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of corrugated metal and wood paneling on the exterior. The structure is elevated, with a series of steps leading up to the main entrance, and includes multiple balconies and terraces with railings. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and visual interest. The property is landscaped with a variety of trees and shrubs, including a leafy deciduous tree, a conifer, and flowering plants. The rear of the house features a wooden deck area, while the front is defined by a series of wooden privacy screens. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with corrugated metal and wood exterior, multiple balconies, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, wooden privacy screens, and a large leafy tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, vertical windows, a tall conifer, and a flowering tree near the wooden deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, balcony, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a prominent leafy tree, wooden deck, and the continuation of the privacy screens.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, wooden privacy screens, and a simple modern door without overhang.
